mapper.select: select op.id, op.create_time, op.order_id, op.sku_id, op.amount, op.product_name, op.spec_name, op.deleted, cps.sku_name, cps.origin_price, cps.current_price, cps.sku_pics, cps.product_id from cm_order_products op left join cm_product_sku cps on op.sku_id = cps.id where op.deleted = '0' and op.order_id = #{orderId}

select cp.id as productId, cp.product_name, cp.product_pics from cm_order_products op left join cm_product_sku cps on op.sku_id = cps.id left join cm_product cp on cps.product_id = cp.id where op.deleted = '0' and op.order_id = #{orderId}
